title: Bridgton Hub the SWD boys U19 Switch Schools SA 20 champs  champions
description: CRICKET NEWS - The Bridgton Hub has retained...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The Bridgton Hub has retained their title as the SWD Boys Switch Schools SA 20 champions with a 10-run victory against Outeniqua High in the final at the Recreation Ground Cricket Stadium on 12 November.


> Bridgton, who batted first, posted 130/8 in their allotted 20 overs, with Ducayne Plaatjies (43) the top runs scorer.


Outeniqua High was dismissed for 120 with one ball to spare, with Lastio Williams (3/17), Ducayne Plaatjies (2/12) and Sherwin Plaatjies (2/22) the pick of the bowlers.

Bridgton Hub, together with the winners of Western Province and Boland, will now lock horns in Paarl in January to determine the Western Cape winners.

Summarised scorecard

Bridgton Hub beat Outeniqua High School with 10 runs:

Bridgton Hub HUB 130/8 - 20 overs. Ducayne Plaatjies 43, Daylen Williams 21*, Nathan Best 2/23.

Outeniqua High 120 all out - 19.5 overs. Dehan Meyer 33, Daniel du Plessis 28, Lastio Williams 3/17, Ducayne Plaatjies 2/12, Shirwin Plaatjies 2/22.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
